description_long: A futuristic adult pedestrian is depicted wearing a form-fitting, tactical outfit with a high-collared hooded vest and asymmetrical long skirt panel. The attire features armored gauntlets, fingerless gloves, and reinforced boots, suggesting a blend of urban utility and combat readiness. The left arm is sleeveless, exposing the shoulder, while the right arm is fully covered, adding to the asymmetrical design. The figure's face is framed by a short, straight hairstyle with blunt bangs, and the expression is neutral and focused. The overall silhouette is sleek and athletic, with visible seams and paneling that emphasize mobility and protection. The ensemble is accessorized with utility belts and pouches, enhancing the impression of preparedness for urban environments.
description: A sleek, athletic adult in a tactical, asymmetrical outfit with armored details, hooded vest, and utility accessories. The figure has a short, straight hairstyle and a focused, neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared hood, sleeveless left arm, armored right arm, and the asymmetrical skirt panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the exposed left arm, the profile of the hood, and the layered utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the hood, the full length of the skirt panel, and the fitted nature of the outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the fully armored right arm, the side profile of the boots, and the utility pouches.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic tactical outfit with hooded vest, armored gauntlets, asymmetrical skirt panel, and utility accessories
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with blunt bangs
